agency.name: Rappahannock Realty Group
agency.tagline: Your local guide to home in the Rappahannock region
agency.about: Rappahannock Realty Group has been serving the Fredericksburg region since 2009. We specialize in residential sales, relocation services, and investment properties across the I-95 corridor. Our agents live in the communities we serve — we know the schools, the commute times, the hidden gems, and the neighborhoods that fit every lifestyle.
specialties: New construction in Stafford and Spotsylvania

agents.name: Marcus Webb
agents.title: Principal Broker
agents.specialty: Luxury homes, Fawn Lake, investment properties

agents.name: Danielle Okonkwo
agents.title: Senior Buyer's Agent
agents.specialty: First-time buyers, Stafford County, new construction

agents.name: Ray Solis
agents.title: Relocation Specialist
agents.specialty: Military relocation, Fort Gregg-Adams, quick-close transactions

buyer_process: 1. Free consultation — we learn your goals, budget, and timeline
2. Pre-approval guidance — we connect you with trusted local lenders
3. Personalized search — curated listings matched to your criteria
4. Tours — in-person or virtual, on your schedule
5. Offer and negotiation — we fight for your best deal
6. Inspection and due diligence — we guide you through every step
7. Closing — typically 30–45 days from accepted offer
seller_process: 1. Free home valuation — accurate, data-driven pricing
2. Pre-listing prep — staging advice, photography, repairs
3. Maximum exposure — MLS, Zillow, Realtor.com, social media
4. Showings and open houses — we handle all scheduling
5. Offer review — we evaluate every offer and negotiate terms
6. Contract to close — we manage inspections, appraisals, and paperwork
agency.commission: Seller's agent fee is typically 2.5–3% of sale price. Buyer representation is free to buyers in most transactions.

testimonials.text: Scout helped me understand the whole process before I even called an agent. By the time I met Danielle, I already knew what I wanted. Closed in 38 days.
Ray made our PCS move actually painless. Everything was lined up before we even drove down from DC.
